name: Honey "Cracker Jacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat honey and margarine in a saucepan over medium heat until well blended, stirring occasionally.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. In a large bowl, combine the popped popcorn and shelled peanuts.
4. Pour the cooled honey mixture evenly over the popcorn and peanuts, stirring gently to ensure even coating.
5. Transfer the coated popcorn and peanuts to a baking pan in a single layer.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 5 to 10 minutes, or until crisp but not brown, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
7. Store in an airtight container.
My Note: This recipe doesn't really taste like traditional Cracker Jacks but it was quite tasty. I'll use more popcorn next time as the popcorn quickly absorbed the honey butter and some pieces were slightly soggy.
